Project.Name: CA23660 - San Diego - Cudahy Pl (land) - 23424 - 2025.04.04 - BL01.xml
Project.Title: Johnson Dev. Hawiian Park Self Storage

Task.Name: Johnson Dev. Hawiian Park Self Storage
Public Storage - 1061 Cudahy Place San Diego CA
Demo Existing Bldg/Slabs,Tank slabs, Retaining walls Etc.
Install Shoring Wall NE corner of Site
Over-Ex & Recompact Bldg Pad & Site areas
Install Private Storm Drain & Chamber System
Install Offsite Fire Tie In & Lateral
Install Site Sewer line to Bldg.
UG Electric Site Lts, Gate Motors etc.
Grade & Pour Site Walks Bollards & Gate Tracks
Agg Base import & "Early" AC Paving option
Elevator Pits Excavate, Waterproofing, Form & Pour
Bldg. Wall Ftgs. & CMU to FF
Fine Grade Slab Base materials & Reinforce Slab on grade
CMU Walls/Roof Ledgers to Top Out
State Elevator inspection scheduling and approval
Layout & Install Hangars from 2nd fl deck
Layout & Install Overhead Hangars from 3rd fl deck
Layout & Install Overhead Hangars from Roof deck
SDG&E Utility Release for Equipment & Cabling
Install Private Storm Drain & Chamber System
Install Offsite Fire Tie In & Lateral
Install Site Sewer line to Bldg.
UG Electric Site Lts, Gate Motors etc.
Grade & Pour Site Walks Bollards & Gate Tracks
Owner Civil Punch list walkthrough & Completion
Install Metal Panel Systems @ Tower Framing
Accumulative Building Inspections & C of O
